description.value: These powerful vision aids can magnify distant items into clear focus, helping ensure no heresy goes unspotted. More advanced, high-quality magnoculars can also give range read-outs, detect heat sources, calculate target location positioning, and take pict-captures of a view for later analysis.
description.summary: These powerful vision aids can magnify distant items into clear focus and advanced models can provide additional tactical read-outs.

system.effect: These powerful vision aids can magnify distant items into clear focus and advanced models can provide additional tactical read-outs.
